posts.text:
Donald Trump’s reckless war of choice in the Middle East is deeply unpopular. 

Republicans should reverse course immediately. 

Trump administration extremists are instead trying to bully the media to lie to the American people. 

They will all be held accountable.

The vile and disgusting rhetoric from sick individuals like Randy Fine and Tommy Tuberville is disgraceful. 

Hate directed at the Muslim community and Mayor Mamdani has no place in America. It is deeply unpatriotic. 

Islamophobia is a cancer that must be eradicated from both the Congress and the Country. 

The shocking silence from Republican leadership is deafening.

Deeply saddened by the death of six service members in connection with the KC-135 crash in western Iraq. 

May God watch over their families and loved ones in this moment of great tragedy. 

Praying for the safety of all of our brave troops that have been placed in harm’s way in the Middle East.

Horrified by the violent antisemitic attack at Temple Israel in Michigan.

Grateful to the security personnel and law enforcement officers who neutralized the suspect and kept members of the Jewish community safe.

The disturbing rise in Antisemitic violence must be aggressively confronted by everyone. We will continue to stand firmly with our Jewish brothers and sisters in Michigan and across the country during this challenging time.

It’s time for Republicans to extend the Affordable Care Act tax credits.

And reverse the harmful cuts to Medicaid in the GOP One Big Ugly Bill.

Enough.


NBC News (@NBCNews)

About 1 in 3 U.S. adults say they’ve made trade-offs to afford health care in the past year, including rationing or skipping medications or borrowing money, according to a poll from West Health-Gallup. nbcnews.com/health/health-ca…




— https://nitter.net/NBCNews/status/2032064159425151244#m

The Republican economy is a disaster.

And now the extremists have gotten us into a reckless war of choice in the Middle East. 

Enough.

Republicans are spending taxpayer dollars to brutalize American citizens and violently target law abiding immigrant families. 

Stephen Miller is the architect of this cruel mass deportation policy. 

Why is this guy still around?

Republicans are spending billions of dollars on Donald Trump’s war of choice in the Middle East. 

The extremists are not willing to spend a dime to lower your grocery bill. 

But they are raising gas prices on working class Americans. 

You deserve better.

Trump promised a Golden Age in America.

Meanwhile.

Republicans are crashing the economy, gas prices are out of control and the extremists are spending billions dropping bombs in the Middle East.

You deserve better.

America is at war, TSA agents aren’t being paid and this guy is playing golf.

Why are House Republicans continuing to support this train wreck?

Sycophants.

The country is in the midst of a devastating affordability crisis.

Republicans haven’t done a damn thing to solve that problem.

But they are willing to spend billions to drop bombs in the Middle East.

Enough.

Video

Taxpayer dollars should be used to lower the high cost of living and make your life more affordable. 

Republicans are instead spending billions to drop bombs in the Middle East.

These extremists are not fit to govern.

The Trump economy lost almost 100,000 jobs last month.

Gas prices are up. ICE is out of control.

And Republicans have started another costly war in the Middle East.

We need regime change in November.

VOTE.
nitter.net/i/broadcasts/1pKkOyXwq…

Kristi Noem is gone. Pam Bondi is next.

Keep the pressure on these extremists.

We cannot allow a wannabe King to drag us into an endless war in the Middle East.

Republicans can find billions for bombs, but nothing to bring down your grocery bill or healthcare costs.

Vote YES on the war powers resolution.

Video

Trump started a war in the Middle East.

Six Americans dead. Thousands stranded.

His justification? He had “a feeling.”

Video
nitter.net/i/broadcasts/1DxLdvZrV…

Donald Trump’s war of choice in the Middle East will not make our country safer.

And the American people know it.
nitter.net/i/broadcasts/1vKpPrNjg…
